candidates.title: European Commission Opens EU Aviation Strategy Consultation, Drone Operators Have Until May 21 To Weigh In
candidates.summary: The European Commission has opened a public consultation on a new EU Aviation and Aeronautics Strategy, covering drones, counter-UAS, and anti-jamming measures. The deadline for drone operators and industry stakeholders to submit feedback is May 21, 2026. The outcome will shape EU drone regulation for the coming years.

candidates.title: Matternet Begins Drone Delivery Operations for NHS Across Central London
candidates.summary: Matternet and Apian have launched commercial drone delivery operations for the NHS in London, transporting medical samples between hospital campuses. This is one of the first large-scale urban drone logistics deployments in Europe, operating under existing regulatory frameworks.

candidates.title: EASA Seeks Industry Feedback on Simplifying Authorisation Rules for Low Risk Drone Operations
candidates.summary: EASA plans to simplify Regulation (EU) 2019/947 to reduce administrative burden on National Aviation Authorities and operators in the specific category. The agency is seeking industry input on streamlining authorisation procedures for low-risk UAS operations across EU member states.

candidates.title: Manna Raises $50M Series B, Partners with Uber for First European Drone Delivery Launch
candidates.summary: Irish drone startup Manna has raised $50 million Series B and announced a partnership with Uber for the first European consumer drone delivery service launching in Ireland. The company plans 40 bases and targets last-mile logistics scale across the US and Europe.

candidates.title: Dutch Specialist Ned Marine Launches Drone and Subsea ROV Inspection Services
candidates.summary: Dutch non-destructive testing specialist Ned Marine has launched combined drone and remotely operated vehicle inspection services for offshore and marine infrastructure. The service targets offshore wind, oil & gas, and port facilities across Northern Europe.
